title: Login Issue
description: User unable to log in with valid credentials.

title: Payment Failure
description: Credit card transactions are failing at checkout.

title: UI Bug on Dashboard
description: The charts are overlapping on mobile view.

title: Slow Page Load
description: Product listing page takes more than 5 seconds to load.

title: Email Notification Delay
description: Welcome emails are arriving 2 hours late.

title: Password Reset Error
description: Reset link expires immediately after being sent.

title: Data Export Feature
description: Request to add CSV export for monthly reports.

title: Database Connection Drop
description: Occasional 500 errors due to DB timeouts.

title: Typo in Terms of Service
description: Spelling mistake in the third paragraph.

title: API Auth Failure
description: Bearer tokens are being rejected randomly.
